name: Mocha Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Hot Fudge Ice Cream Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round pans.
3. Prepare, bake, and cool cake following package directions.
4. For filling, combine hot fudge topping and coffee crystals in a medium saucepan. Heat until the coffee crystals are dissolved.
5. Cool. Fold 2 cups whipped topping into the fudge topping mixture.
6. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
7. Place one cake layer on serving plate. Spread with 1 cup filling.
8. Top with second cake layer.
9. Add remaining 2 cups whipped topping to the remaining filling.
10. Frost top and sides of cake with topping mixture.
11. Garnish with chocolate curls, coated coffee beans, or grated chocolate.
